title: Settings panel uses shared RightSidebar component
description:
Migrate the existing settings panel (mode, theme, motion, typeface) from its current GSAP fixed-position overlay to the new shared RightSidebar component. All existing settings content and behavior remain unchanged; only the container and animation mechanism changes.

Scenario: Settings panel opens as a right sidebar

Given the user clicks the settings button in the toolbar
Then the settings panel opens using the shared RightSidebar component
And the kanban board animates to become narrower
And the settings panel sits at the same Z-level as the board columns
And no overlay or dimming layer appears over the board

Scenario: Existing settings content is preserved

Given the settings sidebar is open
Then it contains the same mode selector (Light, Dark, System)
And the same theme selector (Neutral, Cool, Warm)
And the same motion selector (Full, Reduced, Off)
And the same typeface selector (Sans, Serif, Mono)
And each control behaves identically to the previous implementation

Scenario: Settings close button closes the sidebar

Given the settings sidebar is open
When the user clicks the X close button
Then the settings sidebar closes
And the kanban board animates back to full width
creator: ryan.porter
